metadata.name: Handle Out-of-Stock Item in an Order

description: During picking, a warehouse associate discovers that the last unit of an item in an order is damaged and cannot be shipped.

nodes.task_description: In the fulfillment application, mark the item as 'Out of Stock' or 'Damaged'.

expected_outcome.value: The associate indicates that the item cannot be fulfilled.

nodes.task_description: The system automatically notifies customer service of the issue.

expected_outcome.value: A task is created for a customer service agent to contact the customer.

nodes.task_description: Pack and ship the rest of the order. The system adjusts the customer's invoice to remove the charge for the unfulfilled item.

expected_outcome.value: The remainder of the order is shipped, and the customer is not charged for the missing item.
